title: Sorting Array with Missing Edge Case

statement.markdown: Write a function that implements Bubble Sort to sort an array of integers in ascending order. Ensure your function handles arrays with all elements being the same, arrays with negative numbers, and arrays with duplicate values. However, your function fails to handle edge cases where the input array is empty.
statement.notes: Your function should not use any sorting functions or built-in sort methods.

examples.explanation: Sorts the array in ascending order
